items.name: Silver 2-Bike Upright Tension Mount Garage Bike Rack by Rad Cycle
items.description: The RAD Aluminum Bike Rack from Rad Sports combines the utility you need with the lightweight strength and lasting quality of aluminum.The Aluminum Bike Rack secures to ceilings from 7 to 11 feet high. The aluminum top plate protects the ceiling from damage, yet holds the bike rack solidly in place. The base plate allows for a tight fit and stability on any surface. Easy installation with no drilling required.

items.name: Aquart Outdoor Shower by Seletti
items.description: Experience the unconventional charm of showering outdoors with the stylish Seletti Aquart Outdoor Shower. Designed to elevate the aesthetics of any garden space, this unique shower combines robust concrete with elegant copper to create a functional piece that doesn't compromise on style.

items.description: Tate 32" Black 5-Drawer Tall Dresser by Crate & Barrel. One small top drawer stacked on four large drawers. Ash and hardwood veneers finished in ebonized black. items.name: Jarnagin Adjustable Writing Desk by Zipcode Design
items.description: This writing desk provides plenty of surface space for work and creative projects. It has a black powder-coated iron frame that supports the engineered wood surfaces. The wood comes in a rustic brown finish for a bit of contrast.

items.name: Portable Air Conditioner
items.description: White portable AC unit with exhaust hose and digital controls. Perfect for cooling individual rooms. Includes window venting kit. Good working condition.

items.name: Gray Geometric Pattern Area Rug
items.description: Large woven area rug with bold black, gray, and cream geometric hexagonal pattern. Textured wool/cotton blend. Some wear visible (see detail photo). Approximate size 8x10 feet.

items.name: Black Velvet Bean Bag Chair
items.description: Oversized round black velvet bean bag chair. Super soft and comfortable. Great for lounging or a media room. Approximately 4 feet in diameter.

items.name: Stainless Steel Cylinder Side Table
items.description: Modern brushed stainless steel cylindrical side table with round glass top. Sleek minimalist design. Approximately 18 inches diameter, 22 inches tall. Great as a bedside or accent table.

items.name: Folding Teak & Walnut Deck Chairs (Set of 2)
items.description: Pair of folding slatted deck chairs — one in natural teak, one in darker walnut finish. Stainless steel hardware. Compact and easy to store. Great for patio, balcony, or indoor use.

items.name: White Nightstand with Glass Door (set of 2 available)
items.description: White wooden nightstand with ribbed glass panel door and open shelf. Classic cottage style. Sturdy construction with clean lines.

items.name: Black Metal Open-Frame Nightstand (set of 2 available)
items.description: Industrial-style black metal open-frame nightstand or side table. Minimalist geometric design with open shelving. Pairs well with modern or industrial decor. Sturdy welded steel construction.

items.name: Modernica Case Study Grey Living Room Set (3 Pieces)
items.description: Full set of Modernica Case Study V-Leg furniture in Grey. Includes the Daybed with Arm, the Daybed Chair, and the Convertible Square Ottoman. Mid-century modern design with signature V-legs. All pieces in excellent condition. Sold as a complete set or separate.
